model._hint: Transformer: city96/FLUX.1-schnell-gguf (flux1-schnell-Q8_0.gguf, ~12 GB). Pipeline components: black-forest-labs/FLUX.1-schnell (gated — HF token required). LoRA: fffiloni/cute-comic-800 (cute-comic-800.safetensors). Q8_0 keeps near-bfloat16 quality with trivial dequantisation overhead on MPS. sequential_cpu_offload disabled (incompatible with GGUF). LoRA applied via set_adapters() (unfused — required for GGUF). | gguf_file is the transformer only. base_model_id supplies VAE, text encoders, scheduler.

lora._hint: 0.9 default. Range: 0.7–1.0. Lower values blend LoRA style with base FLUX aesthetics.

generation._hint: 4 steps (schnell sweet spot). Range: 1–8. More steps do not improve quality for distilled models. | FLUX.1-schnell is CFG-distilled → guidance_scale MUST be 0.0. Any positive value degrades quality. | FLUX native 1024×1024. Square format suits illustration cards well.

system._hint: ~12 GB peak; sequential_cpu_offload: disabled (incompatible with GGUF)

notes.about: Generates warm, flat children's-book-style comic illustrations — bold outlines, simplified shapes, cheerful characters, and soft pastel tones. Well-suited for greeting cards, story illustrations, and character portraits.
notes.prompt_guide: TRIGGER WORD REQUIRED: append 'in the style of TOK' to every prompt — without it the LoRA style barely activates. Examples: 'a brave knight in the style of TOK', 'two children playing in a garden in the style of TOK', 'a cozy winter cabin in the style of TOK'.
